top_signals.title: Oil Industry Makes Tentative Moves Ahead of Deal to Open Hormuz
top_signals.summary: The oil and shipping industry remains largely in wait-and-see mode ahead of Friday’s deadline to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, although there are some tentative signs of preparations as a handful of ships begin rerouting toward the Middle East while Iranian tankers laden with oil move out.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Taiwan's top diplomat seeks tighter Philippine ties against China coercion
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UniQure to seek FDA approval for Huntington's disease gene therapy after previous clash with agency
top_signals.summary: The announcement comes months after UniQure became embroiled in a public debate with FDA leaders over the clinical trial data supporting its application.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Government publishes Terms of Reference for Wholesale Digital Markets Champion
top_signals.summary: Government has today (16 June) set out in further detail what Chris Woolard will focus on and deliver.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Mutares Is Said to Mull Sale or IPO of Portuguese Firm Efacec
top_signals.summary: Mutares SE & Co. is exploring options for Portuguese engineering group Efacec, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Polychain and Coinbase-backed Satori Finance DEX winds down citing ‘unfavorable market conditions’
top_signals.summary: Satori raised $10 million in a May 2022 seed round led by Polychain Capital with participation from Coinbase, Jump and others.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
